expectations.text: Confirms ESRS 2 General Disclosures are mandatory regardless of DMA
expectations.evidence: Correctly identifies ESRS 2 as mandatory regardless of DMA

expectations.text: Lists key E1 disclosures including Scope 1/2/3 GHG and transition plan (E1-1)
expectations.evidence: Lists Scope 1/2/3 GHG, transition plan, scenario analysis for E1

expectations.text: Notes E1-1 transition plan is legally required under Art. 19a even if climate were non-material
expectations.evidence: Does not specifically note transition plan is required even if E1 were non-material under Art. 19a(2)(a)

expectations.text: Lists key S1 disclosures including gender pay gap and LTIFR
expectations.evidence: Lists gender pay gap, LTIFR, CEO pay ratio for S1

expectations.text: States non-material topics require a materiality statement but not full disclosure
expectations.evidence: Notes non-material topics need exclusion rationale documented
